name: Superior Reflective Fire Glass Kit - 5 Pounds
description: The form is just as important as function when it comes to your fireplace, but what are your options if you're tired of the same-old same-old? Ceramic logs have long been the standard for gas fireplace media, but Superior brings you an alternative with their Reflective Fire Glass Kits. These kits feature recycled glass pieces specially tempered to withstand the heat gas fireplace burners produce. Each unique shard features many faces that capture the flames as they dance, and the reflective sides help create the look of a full and lively fire.
